name: CROO Agent Hackathon
eligibility: open - builders, students, and teams worldwide
theme: Build paid, callable AI agents on the CROO agent commerce layer
sponsor_tech: Base + USDC settlement (gas sponsored by CROO)
key_constraints: Agent must be CALLABLE on CROO. Implement CAP: AgentClient + WebSocket loop + accept -> deliver; OrderPaid handler; DeliverableType match; typed error helpers; idempotent re-delivery. Settle in USDC.
winning_shape_hint: A real, callable agent that does ONE useful job end-to-end on the CROO protocol, with correct CAP integration and a clean Agent Store listing.
